title: diphasiastrum complanatum var. dilatatum
intro: Diphasiastrum complanatum var. dilatatum, also known as the broad-leaved forked polypody or dilated forked polypody, is a variety of the Diphasiastrum complanatum plant, which belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family of plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum complanatum var. dilatatum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
